meaning: every 15 minutes during every other hour

slate.text: alle 15 Minuten in jeder zweiten Stunde
Alle 15 Minuten, alle 2 Stunden
Alle 15 Minuten in jeder zweiten Stunde.
Alle 15 Minuten in jeder zweiten Stunde.

B.note: Ambiguous; it sounds like two separate schedules rather than one occurring within the other.

C.note: Identical to A; capitalization/punctuation are ignored per instructions.

D.note: Identical to A; capitalization/punctuation are ignored per instructions.

meaning: every minute during every other hour

slate.text: jede Minute in jeder zweiten Stunde
jede Minute in jeder zweiten Stunde
Jede Minute, alle 2 Stunden
Jede Minute in jeder zweiten Stunde.

C.note: slightly more colloquial, but 'alle 2 Stunden' can be ambiguous (every 2 hours vs every second hour)

D.note: accurate, but contains a period which was noted as not to be penalized

meaning: every 15 minutes during every third hour

slate.text: Alle 15 Minuten, alle 3 Stunden
alle 15 Minuten in jeder dritten Stunde
Alle 15 Minuten jede dritte Stunde.
Alle 15 Minuten in jeder dritten Stunde.

A.note: Ambiguous; sounds like 'every 15 minutes AND every 3 hours' rather than one happening within the other.

B.note: Perfectly natural and precise translation of the English meaning.

C.note: Grammatically correct, though slightly more clipped than B.

meaning: every 20 minutes during the 9 a.m., 11 a.m., 1 p.m., 3 p.m., and 5 p.m. hours

slate.text: alle 20 Minuten in den Stunden von 9, 11, 13, 15 und 17 Uhr
Alle 20 Minuten, alle 2 Stunden, zwischen 09:00 und 17:59
Alle 20 Minuten in den Stunden von 9, 11, 13, 15 und 17 Uhr.
Alle 20 Minuten in den Stunden von 9, 11, 13, 15 und 17 Uhr.

A.note: Perfectly matches the meaning and feels natural as a fragment.

B.note: Incorrect. This describes a continuous range from 9 to 18, not disjoint hours.

meaning: every minute during the 12 a.m., 5 a.m., 10 a.m., 3 p.m., and 8 p.m. hours

slate.text: Jede Minute während der Stunden um 0, 5, 10, 15 und 20 Uhr.
Jede Minute, alle 5 Stunden
Jede Minute in den Stunden von 00, 05, 10, 15 und 20 Uhr.
jede Minute in den Stunden von 0, 5, 10, 15 und 20 Uhr

A.note: Understandable, but 'Stunden um X Uhr' is slightly ambiguous (could mean 'around' the hour).

B.note: Incorrect. This describes an interval of every 5 hours, not specific clock hours.

C.note: Correct and clear. Using '00' is common for the midnight hour.

D.note: Correct and natural; virtually identical to C.
